# backend/middleware/etag.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-13T10:03:13Z

## Purpose
ETag/304 caching middleware · Iter 27 · C4 closure.

Computes ETag from response body for GET responses · returns 304
Not Modified when If-None-Match matches. Saves bandwidth on
panels that re-poll the same data.

Per §47.7 + §6.3 spec.

## Imports
- from `__future__` import annotations
- from `_` import hashlib
- from `starlette.middleware.base` import BaseHTTPMiddleware
- from `starlette.requests` import Request
- from `starlette.responses` import Response

## Inputs
(no CLI / env inputs — library module or implicit)

## Process
### Classes
- `ETagMiddleware`: Add ETag header to GET responses · respect If-None-Match.

## Outputs
- Return values from functions above

## Notable inline comments
- Iter 27 · only GET to safe API paths · skip streaming and SSE
- Read body via iterator (necessary for hashing)
